svg.title: Automated population — concrete end-to-end example
svg.desc: Traces a budget overrun through the four-layer system from raw tool data to a surfaced signal and optional promoted Risk Record.
svg.text: Layer 1 — Source
Layer 2 — Normalize
Layer 3 — Calculate
Layer 4 — Experience
Raw data read from Budget tool
project: "Tower Block NE1001"
originalBudget: $4,200,000 | revisedBudget: $4,410,000 | forecastToComplete: $4,505,000
pendingChangeEvents: 6 | pendingCEExposure: $312,000 | contingencyRemaining: 18%
Source: Budget tool — read directly. No human entry required at this layer.
Normalization — compute derived values, check thresholds
budgetVariancePct = (forecastToComplete - revisedBudget) / revisedBudget = +2.15%
contingencyRemainingPct = 18% → threshold check: <30% = Yellow
pendingCEExposure = $312K on $4.41M budget = 7.1% → threshold check: >5% of budget = Yellow
All three values exceed the account-level ThresholdRules for the Cost dimension.
Rule engine — current-state path
Cost dimension score = worst of contributing rules = Yellow (contingency <30% triggers it)
Reasons generated: "Contingency at 18% (threshold: <30% = Yellow)" · "6 pending CEs totalling $312K"
No open Risk Records yet → forecastStatus = same as currentStatus (no enrichment)
signalOrigin = 'automated' · integrityResult = complete (all fields present)
Experience layer — signal surfaces in tearsheet, no human action required
Project "Tower Block" shows Yellow Cost badge in portfolio table · DualStatusBadge: Yellow | Yellow (no forecast)
Opening tearsheet shows evidence card: "Cost — contingency at 18%, 6 pending change events $312K"
Promote button available · All three reasons shown · Origin: Automated · No PM action required to get here
— optional from here — user decides whether to promote —
If promoted — Risk Record is created and forecast changes
type: "Financial Risk" | title: "Cost overrun risk — contingency erosion + CE exposure"
probability: 3 (PM sets this) | impactCost: { min: $200K, expected: $312K, max: $450K }
linkedItems: [CE batch, budget line] | origin: 'promoted' | status: Open
Forecast now: probability(3/5) × expected impact($312K) = $187K expected exposure added to Cost forecast
DualStatusBadge updates: Yellow current | At Risk forecast → the "Healthy now, At Risk forecast" demo state
